question: What two abilities do Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' possess?

ops.description: Quantum Society exists in multiple dimensions simultaneously.
The wings of a Glimmerwing Moth are prized for their iridescent dust.
The Grand-Alchemist is involved in the study and mastery of alchemical arts.

The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.<SEP>Aeridium Ore allows the Floating Islands of Aeridia to move slowly across the sky and is considered sacred by many cultures.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides buoyancy.

entities.name: Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors'
entities.description: Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' are magical mirrors capable of revealing 'Soul-Echoes' and projecting 'Phantom-Images'.

entities.name: Phantom-Images
entities.description: 'Phantom-Images' are illusory duplicates created by Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' that can interact with the physical world.

entities.name: Phantasmal Realm
entities.description: The Phantasmal realm exists between reality and dreams.

relations.description: Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' can reveal 'Soul-Echoes' that show the true nature of beings.
The Phantasmal realm is the domain where Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' exist.
Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' project 'Phantom-Images' that can interact with the physical world.
Phantasmal artisans work with ethereal materials to craft Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors'.
The Hall-of-Mirrors contains Phantasmal 'Spirit-Mirrors' creating a maze of infinite reflections.

entities.description: Triskelion has three moons in a stable figure-8 orbit.

entities.name: Central Command Unit
entities.description: The Central Command Unit is a device to which data from the Pathfinder Helm can be transmitted.

entities.name: Song-Bronze
entities.description: Song-Bronze is a type of bronze used to cast Harmony-Bells, known for producing perfect musical tones and requiring specific temperature conditions during forging.

entities.name: Xylotian Explorers
entities.description: Xylotian explorers carry Survival Packs with rations and tools.
